scripts.build: vite build && node --input-type=module -e "import{copyFileSync}from'fs';copyFileSync('manifest.json','dist/manifest.json');try{copyFileSync('public/icon-16.png','dist/icon-16.png');copyFileSync('public/icon-48.png','dist/icon-48.png');copyFileSync('public/icon-128.png','dist/icon-128.png');}catch(e){console.warn('Icons not found, skipping')}"
